name: 18p11_31_STK11_paralog_SD
description: 18p11.31 SDs containing a STK11 paralog (the canonical STK11 is on 19p13.3). The paralog cassette is part of a chr18 SD block that shares ancestry with chr19p13.3 duplicons and contributes to STK11-targeted MLPA artefacts.

architecture.internal_structure: STK11 paralog fragment plus C18orf42 duplicon, ~50 kb at ~96% identity to chr19p13.3 STK11; flanked by smaller SD modules.
